requirement_topic.en: EMC and Wireless Approval — NTRA Type Approval for Any Radio Feature (No CE Marking in Egypt)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线批准——任何无线功能须经NTRA型号核准（埃及不使用CE标志）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容與無線批准——任何無線功能須經NTRA型號核准（埃及不使用CE標誌）

summary.en: Egypt does not use the EU CE marking. For lithium products with any radio function (for example a power bank with wireless charging that uses RF, or Bluetooth/Wi-Fi tracking), type approval from the National Telecom Regulatory Authority (NTRA) is required before import and sale; NTRA approval references international RF/EMC and SAR test methods (e.g. IEC/CISPR and ETSI/FCC-style RF reports) and is processed in the name of a locally established applicant. For non-radio lithium products, electromagnetic compatibility is handled through the applicable EOS (ES) standards and GOEIC import inspection rather than a CE-equivalent mark. Mains-charged units must be designed for Egypt's 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase supply, which shares China's 50 Hz frequency and is close to China's 220 V single-phase nominal voltage (China's industrial supply is 380 V three-phase).
summary.zh: 埃及不使用欧盟CE标志。对于具备任何无线功能的锂产品（例如使用射频的无线充电移动电源，或蓝牙/Wi-Fi追踪功能），进口及销售前须取得国家电信监管局（NTRA）的型号核准；NTRA核准引用国际射频/电磁兼容及SAR测试方法（如IEC/CISPR及ETSI/FCC式射频报告），并以在埃及设立的申请人名义办理。对于非无线锂产品，电磁兼容通过适用的EOS（ES）标准及GOEIC进口检验处理，而非CE等效标志。市电充电机型须按埃及220 V、50 Hz单相供电设计，其频率与中国同为50 Hz，单相标称电压亦接近中国的220 V（中国工业供电为380 V三相）。
summary.zht: 埃及不使用歐盟CE標誌。對於具備任何無線功能的鋰產品（例如使用射頻的無線充電行動電源，或藍牙/Wi-Fi追蹤功能），進口及銷售前須取得國家電信監管局（NTRA）的型號核准；NTRA核准引用國際射頻/電磁兼容及SAR測試方法（如IEC/CISPR及ETSI/FCC式射頻報告），並以在埃及設立的申請人名義辦理。對於非無線鋰產品，電磁兼容透過適用的EOS（ES）標準及GOEIC進口檢驗處理，而非CE等效標誌。市電充電機型須按埃及220 V、50 Hz單相供電設計，其頻率與中國同為50 Hz，單相標稱電壓亦接近中國的220 V（中國工業供電為380 V三相）。

standards_or_laws: NTRA type approval — National Telecom Regulatory Authority, Egypt (Telecom Regulation Law No. 10/2003)
ES (Egyptian Standard) EMC requirements adopting IEC/CISPR methods (EOS)
GOEIC import inspection regime — Ministry of Trade and Industry, Egypt

summary.en: In China, electromagnetic compatibility for electronic products follows GB/T 9254 / GB 17743 (CISPR-based emission limits) and related GB EMC standards, with CCC certification applying to certain finished electronics. Radio products require a Radio Type Approval (SRRC / Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, MIIT) and, for some categories, a Network Access Licence. These Chinese radio and EMC approvals are domestic and are not recognised by Egypt's NTRA, which issues its own type approval.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子产品的电磁兼容遵循GB/T 9254 / GB 17743（基于CISPR的发射限值）及相关GB EMC标准，CCC认证适用于某些成品电子产品。无线产品须取得无线电型号核准（SRRC／工业和信息化部MIIT），部分类别还需进网许可。这些中国无线电与EMC批准属国内性质，不被埃及NTRA认可——后者签发自有的型号核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子產品的電磁兼容遵循GB/T 9254 / GB 17743（基於CISPR的發射限值）及相關GB EMC標準，CCC認證適用於某些成品電子產品。無線產品須取得無線電型號核准（SRRC／工業和信息化部MIIT），部分類別還需進網許可。這些中國無線電與EMC批准屬國內性質，不被埃及NTRA認可——後者簽發自有的型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 / GB 17743 — China EMC emission standards (CISPR-based)
SRRC Radio Type Approval — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT), for radio products

gap.en: Two distinct gaps: (1) There is no CE mark in Egypt, so an EU CE Declaration of Conformity carries no automatic weight; EMC for non-radio products is verified through EOS standards and GOEIC inspection. (2) If the lithium product has any radio function, NTRA type approval is a separate, locally filed prerequisite that a Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy. Exporters typically need internationally recognised RF/EMC/SAR test reports submitted by a local applicant. A Chinese exporter holding only GB EMC reports, a CCC mark, or SRRC approval has no document NTRA or GOEIC will accept at face value.
gap.zh: 两类不同差距：（1）埃及无CE标志，故欧盟CE符合性声明不自动具备效力；非无线产品的电磁兼容通过EOS标准及GOEIC检验核实。（2）若锂产品具备任何无线功能，NTRA型号核准是另行在埃及本地提交的前置条件，中国SRRC核准不能满足。出口商通常需由本地申请人提交国际认可的射频/电磁兼容/SAR测试报告。仅持有GB EMC报告、CCC标志或SRRC核准的中国出口商，没有任何NTRA或GOEIC会径行接受的文件。
gap.zht: 兩類不同差距：（1）埃及無CE標誌，故歐盟CE符合性聲明不自動具備效力；非無線產品的電磁兼容透過EOS標準及GOEIC檢驗核實。（2）若鋰產品具備任何無線功能，NTRA型號核准是另行在埃及本地提交的前置條件，中國SRRC核准不能滿足。出口商通常需由本地申請人提交國際認可的射頻/電磁兼容/SAR測試報告。僅持有GB EMC報告、CCC標誌或SRRC核准的中國出口商，沒有任何NTRA或GOEIC會逕行接受的文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for radio features — NTRA type approval required before import/sale of any lithium product with a radio function; EMC for non-radio products checked via EOS standards and GOEIC inspection (no CE mark in Egypt)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB EMC standards plus SRRC radio type approval (and CCC where applicable) required for products sold in China

source.publisher: NTRA — National Telecom Regulatory Authority, Egypt

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt does not use CE marking; EMC for non-radio lithium products is handled through EOS standards and GOEIC inspection, while any radio feature requires NTRA type approval filed by a local applicant using internationally recognised RF/EMC/SAR reports. Chinese GB EMC reports, a CCC mark, or SRRC approval do not satisfy these Egyptian routes. Exporters should confirm whether their product has any radio function and, if so, plan NTRA type approval; otherwise focus on EOS/GOEIC EMC conformity and verify current rules with their Egyptian importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及不使用CE标志；非无线锂产品的电磁兼容通过EOS标准及GOEIC检验处理，而任何无线功能须由本地申请人以国际认可的射频/电磁兼容/SAR报告办理NTRA型号核准。中国GB EMC报告、CCC标志或SRRC核准不能满足上述埃及路径。出口商应确认产品是否具备无线功能，若有则规划NTRA型号核准；否则聚焦EOS/GOEIC电磁兼容合格，并向埃及进口商核实现行规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及不使用CE標誌；非無線鋰產品的電磁兼容透過EOS標準及GOEIC檢驗處理，而任何無線功能須由本地申請人以國際認可的射頻/電磁兼容/SAR報告辦理NTRA型號核准。中國GB EMC報告、CCC標誌或SRRC核准不能滿足上述埃及路徑。出口商應確認產品是否具備無線功能，若有則規劃NTRA型號核准；否則聚焦EOS/GOEIC電磁兼容合格，並向埃及進口商核實現行規則。
